transcript.text:
[Tteokboki CEOs]
Earnings...?
[Over 10 billion Won per year]
Please teach me
[Tteokboki (Spicy rice cake) made by young & rich CEOs]
[This is Daldduk]
[With lots of cheese]
[How much are you drinking?]
3L? 3kg?
[Let's break some records today]
[Located near tall buildings]
Hello everyone
I'm at Yeongdeungpo to eat some tteokboki (spicy rice cake)
I own a tteokboki restaurant
I'll go find out the ways of tteokboki
Ta-da Dal tokki's tteokboki

Their character is really cute
[Daldduk]
Let's go
-Hello -Welcome
I've been wanting to meet you
-You're really pretty when you eat -Really? Thank you
You're the CEO, right?
Yes, with him over here
We're Baskin-Robbins-31 years old
Please take a seat
They have so many different kinds
They have Toowoomba Beef belly sounds good too
What's the most popular dish?
Our Toowoomba tteokboki is the signature
Guys order the beef belly one a lot
If you want the original taste, order the soup tteokboki

Toowoomba looks good, so let's do the 3-4 serving one
And 1-2 servings for the Jjajang (black bean), beef belly, and soup tteokbokis
You really do eat a lot
And
Sampler,
Arancini, and chicken karaage
Ah, okay
Thank you
[I was nervous...]
-I forgot to ask aobut the flavors -Flavors?
[You do it]
My heart is beating so fast
[Substitute]
I forgot to add toppings
Which ones would you like?
Cheese and beef belly on the toowoomba tteokboki

Glass noodles on the jjajang tteokboki
Spaghetti on the beef belly tteokboki
Would you recommend mild or medium?
Medium is better
Then Medium spiciness all around
Spicy for this one
PD: I don't think he got any of that
PD: Look at the notepad
What's this?
Did you get the order?
I got it memorized
-We will serve you correctly -Thank you
Thank you
So much cheese
Big portions too
Everything is here

Toowoomba, beef belly, original, jjajang
With lots of cheese on top
It just came out right now so it's fresh
Looks really good Let's mix it up
They give pasta noodles for 3-4 serving orders
I didn't order it, but it comes with it
Lots of sausages too
Bon appetit
Which one first? Toowoomba
I just tasted it a little bit and it was really good
The sausage is really meaty
As a tteokboki restaurant owner...
That's so good
I thought it'd be similar to Rosé sauce because of the color
But it's completely different
The sauce is really delicious

Rosé sauce gives tomato flavors
This is much more light
The sauce tastes amazing
Cheese!
I added beef belly toppings because it says over there
Recommended to add beef belly to toowoomba tteokboki
This feels like spaghetti because of the noodles
I've spilt already
The sauce is everything
I've only tried Toowoomba a couple of times
But this one is the best
I want to get this delivered at home
It's not spicy or overwhelming
Cheese rice cake
It has cheese inside
She's such a great eater

Her explanation is great too
PD: She's known to be very bad at explaning the taste
Her expressions say it all
Cheese explosion Do you see this?
Cheese goes so well with this
It's double the cheesiness
2 times, right?
This is the only dish with regular rice cake
Mix it up
Noodle rice cake for 1-2 serving dishes
Let's cut it up
Let's see how the original tastes
Tasty
Just the right amount of sweetness and spiciness
The sauce tastes good in general
This is more on the lighter side compared to the original

The original is great That's why everything else is good too
Let's try this now I've never had Arancini before
Deep-fried rice ball, right?
It's not just rice
Seasoned rice, corn, and cheese
Crispy on the outside, soft on the inside
Chewy on the inside
Very good
The cheese hardened because of the AC
Let's try the chicken karaage too
Big and meaty
So good
So juicy and tender
This should go well with Toowoomba sauce
Beef belly next
Some soup first

All of them taste different
Thought it'd be similar
This feels more clean Is it because of the meat?
Delicious
Soft consistency with meat flavors
Let's eat this
Squid (calamari)
Dip
Calamari tastes so good
[Omg it's Tzuyang!!!]
[Hearts]
[Thank you]
[She responded!]
[So happy]
I love how they have a variety of toppings Not just rice cake and fishcake
That's why you can eat a lot and not get tired of it

This really feels like pasta
It tastes better than pasta
Better than your average pasta dish
Really
Fried fishcake
Dip
It's a big piece of fishcake
Fried seaweed, my favorite
So crispy
Dip in Toowoomba
Really crispy
This is 3-4 servings
It may not look a lot
But the bowl is deep
-How is it? -It's really good, I'm shocked
So thankful to be complimented by a tteokboki owner

I really love the Toowoomba sauce
It's a golden balance with cheese and our signature sauce
You can consider it as a spicy cream tteokboki
Let's try the beef belly one
I added the pasta noodles in here
The taste of the beef belly is very savory
And it's strong
This feels exquisite
Pasta noodles...
How do I explain this?
Can I say something
It's like Yaki Udon
It was recommended by franchise owners
How many branches do you have?
We have over 80 branches around the country
We started in Daejeon

When we were 24 Total of 8 years together
-This place for 8 years? -No, from the streets
We have a yellow steak food truck
It was called Muhseum Steak
Mainly around apartment buildings
[The CEOs' journey started with this food truck]
It was difficult because of the weather
So we started dine-in which was a chicken restaurant
[Their 2nd attempt to survive in the food industry]
[And this did not go well either]
This guy had to go work at a different restaurant to pay for our own employees
We would serve and deliver all on our own
And we started making tteokboki to give on the side for free with chicken orders
There were times we were out of tteokboki ingredients and they would cancel their order of chicken
-That's how popular it was? -Yes
So that's how we got to start our tteokboki business

80 stores in the country...
What's the earnings?
Over 10 billion Won (~$7.5m USD)
That's amazing
Respect...
Do you 2 ever argue running a business together?
We're bestfriends since elementary
And our personalities are totally opposite I'm very outgoing. ENTJ
His MBTI is ESFJ
I guess we don't fight because we're different
Our tteokboki is made with love
Their tteokboki has history
He did say that this is kind of like Yaki Udon
And it really does feel like it
Very unique but it works
Refreshing

The original one tastes great too
Everyone would enjoy this
Glass noodles
They give you a lot of side toppings like sausages
I love it
Shrimp tempura
This will go well with Toowoomba sauce too
Yummy
I'll dip the sweet potato here
So sweet Yum
Thank you
He's opening it for me Thank you
He opened it completely
We will change this out to a new one since it's been sitting here
Thank you
This is it

Let's push it inside so it stays melted
Hide in in there
The sauce is very thick
I don't think I've ever had a good jjajang tteokboki
I want to add rice in here
Glass noodles in here too
This goes well
This is like a jumbo jjajangmyun
I had 4 different styles of tteokboki
First place is...
Toowoomba It's really delicious
Thank you
He came like the wind
Too many cartons
The vienna sausages are good
Very meaty

Quail eggs
7 cartons of Cool Peace... (Peach drink)
It's 450mL per carton So that's 3L
Which is 3kg
Dear Cool Peace, Tzuyang drank 3kg of your drink in my store
Sponsor her
Dumpling
With lots of sauce
Really crispy
Beef belly
Finished
Everybody claps when I finish eating for some reason
Because that was incredible
I had a great meal
Good luck with your business!
You as well
Thanks everyone! [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
